item.title: C/C++ Lecture Notes 2
item.description: Integer Defining: int i = 10; int j; // BAD j = 10 // This is called assignment // Not Initialize Remmber to initialize a variable althought it would not cause an error.

item.title: C/C++ Lecture Notes 1
item.description: Lecture notes and examples: https://github.com/ShiqiYu/CPP Lecture videos: https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1Vf4y1P7pq How C/C++ work?
